sentences.arabic: يَبْدَأُ الْمُوَظَّفُ النَّاجِحُ يَوْمَهُ بِتَنْظِيمِ الْمَهَامِّ.
sentences.translation: Uspješan zaposlenik započinje svoj dan organizacijom zadataka.
sentences.translationEn: A successful employee starts his day by organizing tasks.

sentences.arabic: يَكْتُبُ قَائِمَةً بِالْأَعْمَالِ الَّتِي يَجِبُ إِنْجَازُهَا.
sentences.translation: On piše listu obaveza koje treba završiti.
sentences.translationEn: He writes a list of tasks that must be completed.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ هَذَا التَّرْتِيبُ عَلَى زِيَادَةِ الْإِنْتَاجِيَّةِ فِي الْمَكْتَبِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj raspored pomaže u povećanju produktivnosti u kancelariji.
sentences.translationEn: This arrangement helps increase productivity in the office.
